category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/t3rm1n4l/megacmd describes a command-line tool for file and directory transfer with Mega.
source_facts.description says "Command-line client for mega.co.nz storage service".
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use the name megacmd: https://github.com/t3rm1n4l/megacmd.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains the project usage section; no separate official docs site found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/t3rm1n4l/megacmd; per instruction repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists file transfer, listing, delete, mkdir, move, and sync operations.
source_facts.description identifies a Mega storage command-line client.
